templates.name: Year-End Pack (Annual Financial Statements)
templates.description: Annual financial statements and CIPC filing for a company or CC. Covers trial balance review through to final AFS package.

tasks.name: Request & receive trial balance
tasks.description: Obtain year-end trial balance from client's accounting system

tasks.name: Trial balance review & adjusting journals
tasks.description: Review TB for errors, prepare adjusting journal entries

tasks.name: Draft annual financial statements
tasks.description: Prepare AFS in compliance with IFRS for SMEs / IFRS

tasks.name: Director / member approval
tasks.description: Submit draft AFS to directors for review and sign-off

tasks.name: CIPC annual return filing
tasks.description: File annual return with CIPC (CoR30.1)

tasks.name: Tax computation & ITR14 preparation
tasks.description: Calculate provisional/final tax and prepare ITR14

tasks.name: Final package & archiving
tasks.description: Compile final signed AFS, tax return, and supporting schedules

templates.name: Monthly Bookkeeping
templates.description: Recurring monthly bookkeeping engagement including bank reconciliation, creditors/debtors, VAT, and management accounts.

tasks.name: Bank reconciliation
tasks.description: Reconcile all bank accounts to bank statements

tasks.name: Creditors reconciliation
tasks.description: Reconcile creditors/accounts payable to supplier statements

tasks.name: Debtors reconciliation
tasks.description: Reconcile debtors/accounts receivable and follow up on overdue accounts

tasks.name: VAT calculation & reconciliation
tasks.description: Calculate input/output VAT for the period, reconcile VAT control account

tasks.name: Management accounts preparation
tasks.description: Prepare income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow for the month

tasks.name: Month-end close & review
tasks.description: Final review, close the period, and send management pack to client

templates.name: Tax Return — Individual (ITR12)
templates.description: Individual income tax return preparation and SARS eFiling submission.

tasks.name: Collect IRP5/IT3(a) certificates
tasks.description: Obtain all employer tax certificates and third-party data from SARS

tasks.name: Medical aid & retirement fund certificates
tasks.description: Collect medical aid tax certificates (IT3(a)) and retirement fund contributions

tasks.name: Rental income schedule
tasks.description: Prepare schedule of rental income and deductible expenses (if applicable)

tasks.name: Capital gains schedule
tasks.description: Calculate capital gains/losses on disposal of assets (if applicable)

tasks.name: Prepare ITR12
tasks.description: Complete the ITR12 return with all income, deductions, and rebates

tasks.name: SARS eFiling submission
tasks.description: Submit ITR12 via SARS eFiling and confirm receipt

tasks.name: Review assessment & sign-off
tasks.description: Review SARS assessment, advise client, and archive

templates.name: Tax Return — Company (ITR14)
templates.description: Company income tax return preparation including tax computation and SARS eFiling submission.

tasks.name: Collect trial balance & AFS
tasks.description: Obtain finalised trial balance and annual financial statements

tasks.name: Tax computation
tasks.description: Calculate taxable income with permanent and temporary differences

tasks.name: Provisional tax review (IRP6)
tasks.description: Review provisional tax payments and calculate any penalties/interest

tasks.name: Prepare ITR14
tasks.description: Complete the ITR14 return with all schedules

tasks.name: Supporting schedules
tasks.description: Prepare fixed asset register, lease schedule, and other required annexures

tasks.name: SARS eFiling submission
tasks.description: Submit ITR14 via SARS eFiling and confirm receipt

tasks.name: Director sign-off & archive
tasks.description: Obtain director approval, archive tax file

templates.name: VAT Return (VAT201)
templates.description: Bi-monthly or monthly VAT201 return preparation and SARS submission.

tasks.name: Collect invoices & receipts
tasks.description: Gather all tax invoices, credit notes, and receipts for the VAT period

tasks.name: VAT reconciliation
tasks.description: Reconcile VAT input/output to accounting records, check apportionments

tasks.name: Prepare VAT201
tasks.description: Complete the VAT201 return form

tasks.name: SARS eFiling submission
tasks.description: Submit VAT201 via SARS eFiling before deadline

tasks.name: Payment instruction
tasks.description: Prepare payment instruction for VAT liability or note refund due
